pages.text: The $(bold)Mechanical Mixer$() over a $(bold)Basin$() combines several ingredients — and many recipes also need $(create)heat$() from a $(bold)Blaze Burner$() underneath.$(br2)$(li)$(bold)No heat$() — simple mixes.$(li)$(bold)Heated$() (lit burner) — most alloys and brewing.$(li)$(bold)Superheated$() (burner fed blaze cake) — the hottest recipes.
pages.title: Mixing

pages.text: Brass, the gateway to Create's second tier, is mixed here from copper and zinc over a heated burner. Andesite alloy, the first tier, can be mixed too.$(br2)A basin will only output once the recipe completes and there's somewhere for the result to go — a belt, a tank, or a funnel pulling it out.
pages.title: Alloys
